class.name: GaussianStreamingSystem
class.brief_description: GPU memory streaming system that manages chunk-based loading and LOD for large Gaussian datasets.
class.description: GaussianStreamingSystem is the primary orchestrator for streaming Gaussian splat data between disk, CPU memory, and GPU VRAM. It divides a [GaussianData] resource into fixed-size chunks (64K splats each by default), manages a ring-buffered upload pipeline, and selects which chunks to keep resident based on camera proximity, frustum culling, VRAM budget, and distance-based LOD. Attach a [GaussianMemoryStream] via [method attach_memory_stream] to enable GPU-side triple-buffered uploads. The streaming system supports chunk frustum culling, predictive prefetching, VRAM budget regulation, and Octree-GS style distance-based LOD transitions. Call [method update_streaming] each frame with the current camera transform and projection to drive the visibility and loading decisions.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Initializes the streaming system with the given [GaussianData] resource. Builds the internal chunk layout and resets all streaming state.

method.name: attach_memory_stream
method.description: Attaches a [GaussianMemoryStream] for GPU-side buffer management. This enables triple-buffered asynchronous uploads.

method.name: update_streaming
method.description: Performs a streaming update using the given camera position and projection. Evaluates chunk visibility, triggers loads and evictions, updates LOD levels, and streams data to GPU buffers. Call once per frame.

method.name: begin_residency_requests
method.description: Begins a manual residency request batch. Use with [method request_chunk_residency] and [method finalize_residency_requests] to explicitly control which chunks are loaded.

method.name: request_chunk_residency
method.description: Requests that a specific chunk at a given LOD level be made GPU-resident. Must be called between [method begin_residency_requests] and [method finalize_residency_requests].

method.name: request_asset_residency
method.description: Requests that all chunks of an asset at a given LOD level be made GPU-resident.

method.name: finalize_residency_requests
method.description: Finalizes the current batch of residency requests and triggers chunk loading.

method.name: get_visible_count
method.description: Returns the number of splats currently visible and GPU-resident.

method.name: begin_frame
method.description: Signals the start of a new rendering frame. Call before [method update_streaming].

method.name: end_frame
method.description: Signals the end of the current rendering frame. Call after rendering is complete.

method.name: get_vram_usage
method.description: Returns the estimated VRAM usage in bytes for currently loaded chunks.

method.name: get_loaded_chunks
method.description: Returns the number of chunks currently loaded in GPU memory.

method.name: get_task_debug_state
method.description: Returns a dictionary containing internal task queue debug information, including pending uploads and eviction state.

method.name: get_streaming_analytics
method.description: Returns a dictionary of streaming performance analytics including load/eviction counts, timing data, and queue depths.

method.name: set_chunk_frustum_culling_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables chunk-level frustum culling. When enabled, chunks whose bounding volumes fall outside the camera frustum are not loaded.

method.name: is_chunk_frustum_culling_enabled
method.description: Returns whether chunk-level frustum culling is enabled.

method.name: set_chunk_frustum_padding
method.description: Sets the frustum padding multiplier for chunk culling. Higher values keep chunks loaded slightly beyond the visible frustum to reduce pop-in.

method.name: get_chunk_frustum_padding
method.description: Returns the current frustum padding multiplier for chunk culling.

method.name: get_chunk_culling_stats
method.description: Returns a dictionary of chunk culling statistics including the number of chunks tested, culled, and visible.

method.name: get_vram_debug_stats
method.description: Returns VRAM budget regulation debug statistics, including budget limits, current usage, and regulation state.

method.name: is_vram_budget_warning_active
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the VRAM budget regulator is currently throttling chunk loads due to budget pressure.

method.name: get_effective_max_chunks
method.description: Returns the effective maximum number of chunks that can be GPU-resident, accounting for VRAM budget regulation.

method.name: get_lod_debug_stats
method.description: Returns distance-based LOD debug statistics including current LOD levels per chunk and transition states.

method.name: get_effective_splat_count
method.description: Returns the effective splat count after LOD and culling have been applied.
